id.description: The id of the payment request.

created.description: The timestamp of the payment request's creation.

updated.description: The timestamp of the payment request's last update.

time_responded.description: The timestamp of when the payment request was responded to.

time_expiry.description: The timestamp of when the payment request expired.

monetary_account_id.description: The id of the monetary account the request response applies to.

user_alias_created.description: The label that's displayed to the counterparty with the mutation. Includes user.

user_alias_revoked.description: The label that's displayed to the counterparty with the mutation. Includes user.

counterparty_alias.description: The LabelMonetaryAccount with the public information of the MonetaryAccount the money was requested from.

merchant_reference.description: The client's custom reference that was attached to the request and the mutation.

attachment.description: The attachments attached to the payment.

batch_id.description: The id of the batch if the request was part of a batch.

scheduled_id.description: The id of the scheduled job if the request was scheduled.

minimum_age.description: The minimum age the user accepting the RequestInquiry must have.

require_address.description: Whether or not an address must be provided on accept.

address_shipping.description: The shipping address provided by the accepting user if an address was requested.

address_billing.description: The billing address provided by the accepting user if an address was requested.

geolocation.description: The geolocation where the payment was done.

reference_split_the_bill.description: The reference to the object used for split the bill. Can be Payment, PaymentBatch, ScheduleInstance, RequestResponse and MasterCardAction
